title: Pleurothallis heterophylla
taxonomy: Pleurothallis heterophylla belongs to the family Orchidaceae and is classified as a species within the genus Pleurothallis. It is native to the tropical regions of Central and South America. The Orchidaceae family is the largest family of flowering plants, comprising over 30,000 known species. Pleurothallis heterophylla is a small epiphytic orchid, meaning it grows on other plants without harming them. This classification helps to understand the plant's characteristics, growth habits, and relationships with other organisms.
